properties.property: -- Auto-converted from GraalScript

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- function onCreated() { -- dontblock(); end -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) { -- setimgpart gclamp.mng,80,80,80,16; -- drawaslight; -- } -- if (playertouchsme && playerdir == 2) { -- say2 *you see something inscribed#b -- on the side of the lamp*#b -- Here's a list of contributors#b -- Levels/Graphics/edits:#b -- Nightmareangel#b -- Outside/Main/Ticket level#b -- scripts: Master Storm/Com013/#b -- Kat/Night/Kiirar/Massokre#b -- Watch System/Minor Scripts in#b -- All Levels: Master Storm/Kat/#b -- Night/Massokre#b -- Studio A scripts: Master Storm/#b -- Night/Kat/Massokre#b -- Idea: Night#b -- Studio B scripts: Kiirar/Kat#b -- Idea: Kiirar#b -- Studio C scripts: Kiirar/Kat#b -- Idea: Valor#b -- Studio D scripts: Night/Kat#b -- Idea: Slocky#b -- Studio E scripts: Kat#b -- Idea: Sting#b -- Studio F scripts: Kat/Night#b -- Idea: Gorth#b -- Asst. Producer: Sting#b -- Studio G Idea: Nightmareangel#b -- Ticket/Warp levels: frim#b -- Studio H Idea: X-mann#b -- Ticket/Main levels: WillieJamal#b -- Studio I scripts: Kat#b -- Idea: Sting/Night#b -- Studio J scripts: Evil#b -- Idea: SneakyKnight#b -- Ticket/Main levels: Rone#b -- Studio K scripts: Com#b -- Idea: Com#b -- Studio M scripts: Massokre#b -- Idea: Massokre#b -- Studio P scripts: Evil/Massokre#b -- Idea: Evil#b -- Main level: Com#b -- Whew...that was long *yawns*#b -- I'm sleepy now...must find some#b -- place to sleep *yawns*#b -- What's this?#b -- *you catch a glimpse of#b -- writing that you missed before*#b -- If you're feeling tired and you#b -- need a place to rest and you#b -- only sleep at the best? Come#b -- to the Red Lamp Inn and we'll#b -- take care of you. This#b -- advertisement was brought to#b -- you by Masa Burgers the only#b -- burger on Graal that's made#b -- with 100% real horse meat!; -- }
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (playertouchsme) { -- say2 Welcome to GC Studios, I'm -- #bemployee Bob. How may I help -- #byou? Want to see an event? -- #bWell tickets are 10 gralats say -- #bbuy ticket to purchase one. To -- #bsee a list of available events -- #bsay 'list'. Buy your ticket and -- #bstep through the specified -- #bstudio in which the event -- #byou're coming to see is in. -- #bHave a nice day. :); -- }

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (playertouchsme) { -- say2 Welcome to GC Studios, I'm -- #bemployee Mark. To see a list -- #bof the available events say -- #b'list'. Tickets are 10 gralats. -- #bTo buy one say buy ticket. -- #bThen go to the studio where -- #bthe event you're here to see -- #bis being hosted. -- #bHave a nice day. :); -- }

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- Stryker, Head of Security;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- Hi, I'm employee Nancy. Welcome#b -- to GC Studios. To see a list of#b -- the current events "playing" say#b -- 'list'. If you'd like to watch one#b -- of the events then purchase#b -- a ticket and step into the#b -- event's specified studio.#b -- Tickets are 10 gralats and#b -- can be purchased by saying#b -- buy ticket. Hope you enjoy#b -- yourself okay now...#b -- buh bye then. :);

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- Player hosting is currently#b -- disabled;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- Disclaimer:#b -- Note you are buying tickets to#b -- be a member of the audience...#b -- not to be in the actual event #b -- itself.;
